name: Hektas Ticaret T.A.S.
summary: Hektas Ticaret T.A.S. manufactures and markets agricultural chemicals and veterinary pharmaceuticals primarily in Turkey. Its crop protection products include fungicides, herbicides, insecticides, acaricides, fumigants, nematicides and soil fumigants, plant growth regulators, winter spray pesticides and summer oils, and molluscicides and other products. The company also offers corn and sunflowers seeds, organomineral, chemical, feed additive, and public health products. It distributes its products through a network of approximately 1,500 point of sales and dealers. The company also exports its products to the Middle Eastern and Central Asian Countries, the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus, the C.I.S. countries, and the Balkan Countries. Hektas Ticaret T.A.S. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Gebze, Turkey.
